character.name: ZhaoTieZhu
character.prompt:
Tactics Ogre Let Us Cling Together SNES style chibi hero heavy axe warrior, western fantasy,
stocky muscular semi-chibi proportion, short and wide square heavy build, grounded planted stance with feet wide apart, tactical silhouette,
veteran warrior in his early 30s, east asian face with strong jaw,
head fully bare and exposed, no helmet,
short jet black hair tied back in a small low ponytail at the nape of the neck, short trimmed black beard,
heavy thick wide overlapping silver full plate armor, bulky armor that makes him look square and wide not tall,
massive silver pauldrons exaggerating shoulder width, thick silver gauntlets, thick silver greaves,
heavy steel cuirass with deep dark navy blue tabard over the chest, brass rivets along the trim,
no cape, no cloak, no fabric hanging from shoulders or back,
massive two-handed western single-edged great axe, the axe head is a huge single curved cleaver-shaped blade on ONE side only with a flat thick back spine, NOT double-bladed,
long wooden haft, axe held resting on right shoulder with both hands,
16-bit SNES pixel art, muted earthy desaturated palette, hand-painted dithered shading, sharp readable silhouette
